categories.name: Public Safety
categories.description: Police, fire, and emergency services — the largest share of the general fund

categories.name: Pensions & Debt
categories.description: CalPERS pension contributions and debt service on bonds — mostly fixed obligations

categories.name: Administration
categories.description: City management, finance, HR, IT, and administrative support

categories.name: Public Works
categories.description: Streets, sidewalks, infrastructure maintenance, and sanitation

categories.name: Health & Human Services
categories.description: Public health, mental health, and human services programs

categories.name: Community Services
categories.description: Housing, social services, community programs, and libraries

categories.name: Parks & Recreation
categories.description: Parks, recreation centers, aquatics, and youth programs

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Miscellaneous city services, grants, and special programs
